untranslatable_reason: Signal references '52-week high' proximity and '5 trading days momentum' which are not available as direct indicators. Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper) is used as a proxy for recent highs, but true 52-week high tracking and 5-day momentum measurement require custom calculation not supported by allowed indicators. Volume confirmation condition partially approximated using vol_ratio_20. Trailing stop at 2% drawdown cannot be expressed with allowed operators.
translation_notes: Approximation: dc_upper used as proxy for 52-week high proximity (not exact 52-week calculation); returns > 0 approximates positive momentum over 5 days; vol_ratio_20 approximates volume confirmation; stop loss set at 8% as specified; profit target at 5% gain expressed as returns > 0.05; trailing stop requirement cannot be directly implemented with available operators.
